snippet.title: Greg Howard - Columbus OH
snippet.description:
Personal channel. Pediatric PT in Columbus, Ohio. Former D1 400m hurdler at Mapleton University. I watch track, gardening how-tos, and PT exercise demos. Not a content creator - just saving videos I love.

Interests: World Athletics, herb spiral gardens, kids PT exercises, half marathon training.

channel.title: Greg Howard - Columbus OH
channel.description: Personal channel. Pediatric PT, former D1 hurdler, backyard gardener. Saving videos on track and field, herb spiral builds, and pediatric exercise demos.
channel.keywords: track and field 400m hurdles pediatric PT gardening herb spiral Columbus Ohio half marathon
